zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Adam Ireland於1268年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親John Ireland26歲，母親Maude Hesketh21歲。他於大約1289年與Avena de Holland在英國英格蘭藍卡爾赫頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1321年住在英國藍卡爾海爾。他去世於1331年在英國藍卡爾海列武德享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Adam Ireland于1268年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，他的父亲John Ireland26岁，母亲Maude Hesketh21岁。他于大约1289年与Avena de Holland在英国英格兰藍卡爾赫頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1321年住在英国藍卡爾海爾。他去世于1331年在英国藍卡爾海列武德享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ireland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: ethnic name denoting someone from Ireland, from Middle English Irland, Irlond, Erlond (Old English Īraland). The country gets its name from the genitive case of Old English Īras ‘Irishmen’ + land ‘land’. The stem Īr- is taken from the Celtic name for Ireland, Èriu, earlier Everiu. The Latin name was (H)ibernia. The surname is especially common in Liverpool, England, which has a large Irish population. Compare Irish .

variants.name: Irelan
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irland
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Ireland  .

variants.name: Irish
meanings: English and Irish (Kilkenny): ethnic name for someone of Irish origin, from Old French Ireis or Middle English Irish ‘Irish’, Latinized as Hiberniens(is). Compare Ireland .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Adam Ireland was born in 1268, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Ireland, was 26 and his mother, Maude Hesketh, was 21. He married Avena de Holland about 1289, in Hutton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He lived in Hale, Lancashire, England in 1321. He died in 1331, in Halewood, Lancashire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Adam Ireland est né en 1268, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Ireland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maude Hesketh, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Avena de Holland environ 1289, à Hutton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il a vécu à Hale, Lancashire, Angleterre en 1321. Il est décédé en 1331, à Halewood, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Adam Ireland 1268 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ireland 26 und seine Mutter Maude Hesketh 21. Er hat um 1289 in Hutton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Avena de Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1321 hat er in Hale, Lancashire, England gelebt. Er starb 1331 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Halewood, Lancashire, England.

Lui sposato Avena de Holland circa 1289, nel Hutton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Vissuto a Hale, Lancashire, England nel 1321. Morì nel 1331, nel Halewood, Lancashire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Adam Irelandが1268年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Irelandは26歳，母Maude Heskethは21歳であった。約1289年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアハットオンでAvena de Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1321年にはイギリスランカシュアイアヘイルに住んでいた。彼は1331年にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイルオオッドで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Adam Ireland(이)가 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ireland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Hesketh(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 후턴에서 Avena de Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1321년도에 영국 랭카실르 헤일에서 살았다. 그는 1331년 영국 랭카실르 헤루드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Adam Ireland nasceu em 1268, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Ireland, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maude Hesketh, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Avena de Holland aproximadamente 1289, em Hutton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele viveu em Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra em 1321. Ele faleceu em 1331, em Halewood, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Adam Ireland родился в 1268 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Ireland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Hesketh, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Avena de Holland около 1289 г. в местности хуттон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он жил в местности хэл, ланкашир, Англия в 1321 году. Он умер в 1331 г. в местности хэльвуд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Avena de Holland aproximadamente 1289, en Hutton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Vivió en Hale, Lancashire, Inglaterra en 1321.
